---
title: "Caught."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "You weren't supposed to find this."
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.secret-shell {
  max-width: 40rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 4rem 1.5rem 8rem;
  text-align: center;
}

/* ── Surveillance drone scene ── */
.drone-scene {
  position: relative;
  width: 16rem;
  height: 16rem;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
}

/* Drone wrapper — hovers up and down */
.drone-hover {
  position: absolute;
  top: 8%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  animation: hover 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes hover {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
  50%       { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-0.6rem); }
}

/* Drone body */
.drone-body {
  width: 4.5rem;
  height: 1.6rem;
  background: #64748b;
  border-radius: 0.8rem;
  position: relative;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

body.quarto-dark .drone-body {
  background: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.8);
}

/* Red eye / camera — pulses alarm */
.drone-body::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 0.7rem;
  height: 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #ef4444;
  animation: eye-pulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 2s;
}

@keyframes eye-pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.6); }
  50%       { opacity: 0.5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.5rem rgba(239, 68, 68, 0); }
}

/* Arms */
.drone-arm {
  position: absolute;
  width: 3.5rem;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--text-secondary);
  top: 50%;
  transform-origin: center;
}

body.quarto-dark .drone-arm {
  background: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);
}

.drone-arm-1 { left: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-30deg); }
.drone-arm-2 { left: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(30deg); }
.drone-arm-3 { right: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-30deg); }
.drone-arm-4 { right: -2.5rem; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(30deg); }

/* Propellers — spinning because it's airborne */
.prop-hub {
  position: absolute;
  width: 2.2rem;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
  border-radius: 2px;
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.prop-hub::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  background: var(--accent);
  border-radius: 2px;
  transform: rotate(90deg);
  opacity: 0.75;
}

.prop-hub-1 {
  top: -0.85rem;
  left: -3.7rem;
  animation: spin 0.25s linear infinite;
}
.prop-hub-2 {
  top: 0.6rem;
  left: -3.7rem;
  animation: spin 0.25s linear infinite reverse;
}
.prop-hub-3 {
  top: -0.85rem;
  right: -3.7rem;
  animation: spin 0.25s linear infinite reverse;
}
.prop-hub-4 {
  top: 0.6rem;
  right: -3.7rem;
  animation: spin 0.25s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

/* Spotlight — real dimensions so transform-origin: top center hits the apex exactly */
.spotlight {
  position: absolute;
  top: 2.9rem;              /* bottom of drone body: 8% of 16rem + 1.6rem ≈ 2.9rem */
  left: calc(50% - 2.5rem); /* center the 5rem-wide beam at the scene midpoint */
  width: 5rem;
  height: 7rem;
  clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 0% 100%, 100% 100%);
  background: rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.18);
  filter: blur(2px);
  transform-origin: top center; /* resolves to (2.5rem, 0) = the apex */
  animation: spotlight-swing 2.2s ease-in-out infinite,
             beam-alarm      1.1s ease-in-out infinite 2s;
}

body.quarto-dark .spotlight {
  background: rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.12);
}

@keyframes spotlight-swing {
  0%   { transform: rotate(-15deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(15deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(-15deg); }
}

@keyframes beam-alarm {
  0%, 100% { background-color: rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.18); }
  50%       { background-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25); }
}

/* Alarm rings — centered on the drone body (top 8% + half body height = ~13%) */
.alarm-ring {
  position: absolute;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
  top: 13%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0);
  opacity: 0;
  animation: ring-expand 2.2s ease-out infinite;
}

.alarm-ring-1 { width: 3rem; height: 3rem; animation-delay: 2s; }
.alarm-ring-2 { width: 5rem; height: 5rem; animation-delay: 2.5s; }
.alarm-ring-3 { width: 7rem; height: 7rem; animation-delay: 3s; }

@keyframes ring-expand {
  0%   { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0); opacity: 0.8; }
  100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}

/* WARNING badge */
.warning-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.2rem;
  right: 0.5rem;
  background: #ef4444;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.55rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.35rem;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
  animation: badge-flash 1.1s step-start infinite;
  animation-delay: 2s;
}

@keyframes badge-flash {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50%       { opacity: 0; }
}

/* Text */
.secret-code {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 5.5rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--accent);
  opacity: 0.22;
}

.secret-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.secret-copy {
  margin: 0 0 2rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.secret-subtext {
  margin: 0 0 2rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  opacity: 0.65;
  font-style: italic;
}

.secret-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  justify-content: center;
}

.secret-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.15rem;
  border-radius: 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease;
}

.secret-link.primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.secret-link.primary:hover,
.secret-link.primary:focus {
  color: #fff;
  opacity: 0.92;
}

.secret-link:not(.primary) {
  color: var(--accent);
  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
  border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
}

.secret-link:not(.primary):hover {
  background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
}

body.quarto-dark .secret-link:not(.primary) {
  color: #93c5fd;
  background: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.08);
  border-color: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.25);
}

body.quarto-dark .secret-link:not(.primary):hover {
  background: rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.15);
}
</style>

<div class="secret-shell">
  <div class="drone-scene" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="alarm-ring alarm-ring-1"></div>
    <div class="alarm-ring alarm-ring-2"></div>
    <div class="alarm-ring alarm-ring-3"></div>
    <div class="spotlight"></div>
    <div class="drone-hover">
      <div class="drone-body">
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-1"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-2"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-3"></div>
        <div class="drone-arm drone-arm-4"></div>
        <div class="prop-hub prop-hub-1"></div>
        <div class="prop-hub prop-hub-2"></div>
        <div class="prop-hub prop-hub-3"></div>
        <div class="prop-hub prop-hub-4"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="warning-badge">INTRUDER</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="secret-code">???</p>
  <p class="secret-title">oh. hello there.</p>
  <p class="secret-copy">
    You weren't supposed to find this page.<br>
    And yet, here you are — poking around URLs like it's a hobby.<br>
    I respect it. I do not endorse it. Now go away.
  </p>
  <p class="secret-subtext" id="ip-log">
    (my surveillance drone has already logged your visit. it knows.)
  </p>
  <div class="secret-links">
    <a class="secret-link primary" href="/">Take me somewhere normal</a>
    <a class="secret-link" href="/projects/">Projects</a>
    <a class="secret-link" href="/blog/">Blog</a>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.ip-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: monospace;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
  color: #ef4444;
  border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3);
  border-radius: 0.3rem;
  padding: 0.05rem 0.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
body.quarto-dark .ip-tag {
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
  border-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.4);
}
</style>

<script>
fetch('https://api.ipify.org?format=json')
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const el = document.getElementById('ip-log');
    if (!el || !data.ip) return;
    const tag = document.createElement('span');
    tag.className = 'ip-tag';
    tag.textContent = data.ip;
    el.textContent = '';
    el.append('(logged: ', tag, '. yeah, we know.)');
  })
  .catch(function() {});
</script>
```
